9	def _configure_logging(verbosity: int) -> None:
10	    if verbosity == 0:
11	        return
12	    log_level = logging.INFO
13	    if verbosity > 1:
14	        log_level = logging.DEBUG
15	    stream_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
16	    stream_handler.addFilter(lambda record: record.name.startswith("tim."))
17	    stream_handler.setLevel(log_level)
18	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])
19	
20	
21	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)
22	@click.option("-v", "--verbose", count=True, default=0)
23	def main(verbose: int) -> None:
24	    _configure_logging(verbose)
25	    ctx = click.get_current_context()
26	
27	    if ctx.invoked_subcommand is None:
28	        project = MacSandboxProject.cwd()
29	        agent = CliAgent(project)
30	        agent.run_forever()
31	
32	
33	@main.command()
34	def run() -> None:
35	    print("run subcommand invoked")

Now I understand the format of the JSONL log files. Each line is a JSON object with:
- `source`: Contains `agent` (e.g., "CliAgent") and `agent_instance` (a number)
- `at`: A timestamp in ISO format
- `message`: The message object with:
  - `role`: "system", "user", "assistant", or "tool"
  - `content`: The actual message content
  - For assistant messages, may also have `reasoning` and `tool_calls`
  - For tool messages, has `id` and `content`

1 """Convert JSONL log files to styled HTML for viewing.""" 2 3 import json 4 from pathlib import Path 5 from html import escape 6 7 8 MESSAGE_TYPE_STYLES: dict[str, dict[str, str]] = { 9 "system": {"bg": "#fef3c7", "border": "#f59e0b", "icon": "⚙"}, 10 "user": {"bg": "#dbeafe", "border": "#3b82f6", "icon": "👤"}, 11 "assistant": {"bg": "#f3e8ff", "border": "#8b5cf6", "icon": "🤖"}, 12 "tool": {"bg": "#ecfdf5", "border": "#10b981", "icon": "🔧"}, 13 } 14 15 DEFAULT_OUTPUT_EXT = ".html" 16 17 18 def _format_timestamp(raw_timestamp: str) -> str: 19 """Return a clean timestamp string with seconds.""" 20 if not raw_timestamp: 21 return "" 22 try: 23 return raw_timestamp[:19].replace("T", " ").replace("Z", " UTC") 24 except (IndexError, TypeError): 25 return raw_timestamp 26 27 28 def _render_content(content: str, message_type: str) -> str: 29 """Render message content with code block formatting.""" 30 escaped = escape(content) 31 if message_type == "assistant" and "```" in content: 32 escaped = escaped.replace("```", "") 33 escaped = escaped.replace("", "") 34 escaped = escaped.replace("", "", 1) 35 return escaped 36 37 38 def _format_message(message: dict) -> str: 39 """Format a single log message as an HTML block.""" 40 message_type: str = message.get("type", "unknown") 41 content: str = message.get("content", "") 42 agent: str = message.get("agent", "") 43 raw_timestamp: str = message.get("timestamp", "") 44 timestamp = _format_timestamp(raw_timestamp) 45 46 styles = MESSAGE_TYPE_STYLES.get(message_type, MESSAGE_TYPE_STYLES["system"]) 47 icon = styles["icon"] 48 border = styles["border"] 49 bg = styles["bg"] 50 51 content_html = _render_content(content, message_type) 52 timestamp_html = f"{escape(timestamp)}" if timestamp else "" 53 agent_html = f" {escape(agent)}" if agent else "" 54 55 return ( 56 f'

Tim Log Viewer

\n" 103 f"{messages_html}\n" 104 "\n\n" 105 ) 106 107 108 def read_log_file(path: Path) -> list[dict]: 109 """Read a JSONL log file and return a list of message dicts.""" 110 messages: list[dict] = [] 111 with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as fh: 112 for line in fh: 113 stripped = line.strip() 114 if stripped: 115 messages.append(json.loads(stripped)) 116 return messages 117 118 119 def convert_log_to_html(path: Path, output_path: Path | None = None) -> Path: 120 """Convert a JSONL log file to an HTML file and return the output path.""" 121 messages = read_log_file(path) 122 if output_path is None: 123 output_path = path.with_suffix(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_EXT) 124 html_content = _build_html(messages) 125 output_path.write_text(html_content, encoding="utf-8") 126 return output_path

11	def _configure_logging(verbosity: int) -> None:
12	    if verbosity == 0:
13	        return
14	    log_level = logging.INFO
15	    if verbosity > 1:
16	        log_level = logging.DEBUG
17	    stream_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
18	    stream_handler.addFilter(lambda record: record.name.startswith("tim."))
19	    stream_handler.setLevel(log_level)
20	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])
21

23	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)
24	@click.option("-v", "--verbose", count=True, default=0)
25	def main(verbose: int) -> None:
26	    _configure_logging(verbose)
27	    ctx = click.get_current_context()
28	
29	    if ctx.invoked_subcommand is None:
30	        project = MacSandboxProject.cwd()
31	        agent = CliAgent(project)
32	        agent.run_forever()
33	
34	
35	@main.command()
36	@click.argument("log_file", type=click.Path(exists=True))
37	@click.option("--output", "-o", type=click.Path(), default=None)
38	def log(log_file: str, output: str | None) -> None:
39	    """Convert a JSONL log file to HTML."""
40	    log_path = Path(log_file)
41	    output_path = Path(output) if output else None
42	    result_path = logviewer.convert_log_to_html(log_path, output_path)
43	    print(f"Log written to {result_path}")
44	
45	
46	@main.command()
47	def run() -> None:
48	    print("run subcommand invoked")

message.content:
1	import logging
2	from pathlib import Path
3	
4	import click
5	
6	from tim.cliagent import CliAgent
7	from tim import MacSandboxProject
8	from tim import logviewer
9	
10	
11	def _configure_logging(verbosity: int) -> None:
12	    if verbosity == 0:
13	        return
14	    log_level = logging.INFO
15	    if verbosity > 1:
16	        log_level = logging.DEBUG
17	    stream_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
18	    stream_handler.addFilter(lambda record: record.name.startswith("tim."))
19	    stream_handler.setLevel(log_level)
20	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])
21	
22	
23	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)
24	@click.option("-v", "--verbose", count=True, default=0)
25	def main(verbose: int) -> None:
26	    _configure_logging(verbose)
27	    ctx = click.get_current_context()
28	
29	    if ctx.invoked_subcommand is None:
30	        project = MacSandboxProject.cwd()
31	        agent = CliAgent(project)
32	        agent.run_forever()
33	
34	
35	@main.command()
36	@click.argument("log_file", type=click.Path(exists=True))
37	@click.option("--output", "-o", type=click.Path(), default=None)
38	def log(log_file: str, output: str | None) -> None:
39	    """Convert a JSONL log file to HTML."""
40	    log_path = Path(log_file)
41	    output_path = Path(output) if output else None
42	    result_path = logviewer.convert_log_to_html(log_path, output_path)
43	    print(f"Log written to {result_path}")
44	
45	
46	@main.command()
47	def run() -> None:
48	    print("run subcommand invoked")

11	def _configure_logging(verbosity: int) -> None:
12	    if verbosity == 0:
13	        return
14	    log_level = logging.INFO
15	    if verbosity > 1:
16	        log_level = logging.DEBUG
17	    stream_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
18	    stream_handler.addFilter(lambda record: record.name.startswith("tim."))
19	    stream_handler.setLevel(log_level)
20	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])
21	
22	
23	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)
24	@click.option("-v", "--verbose", count=True, default=0)
25	def main(verbose: int) -> None:
26	    _configure_logging(verbose)
27	    ctx = click.get_current_context()
28	
29	    if ctx.invoked_subcommand is None:
30	        project = MacSandboxProject.cwd()
31	        agent = CliAgent(project)
32	        agent.run_forever()
33	
34	
35	@main.command()
36	@click.argument("log_file", type=click.Path(exists=True))
37	@click.option("--output", "-o", type=click.Path(), default=None)
38	def log(log_file: str, output: str | None) -> None:
39	    log_path = Path(log_file)
40	    output_path = Path(output) if output else None
41	    result_path = logviewer.convert_log_to_html(log_path, output_path)
42	    print(f"Log written to {result_path}")
43	
44	
45	@main.command()
46	def run() -> None:
47	    print("run subcommand invoked")

11	def _configure_logging(verbosity: int) -> None:
12	    if verbosity == 0:
13	        return
14	    log_level = logging.INFO
15	    if verbosity > 1:
16	        log_level = logging.DEBUG
17	    stream_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
18	    stream_handler.addFilter(lambda record: record.name.startswith("tim."))
19	    stream_handler.setLevel(log_level)
20	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])
21	
22	
23	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)
24	@click.option("-v", "--verbose", count=True, default=0)
25	def main(verbose: int) -> None:
26	    _configure_logging(verbose)
27	    ctx = click.get_current_context()
28	
29	    if ctx.invoked_subcommand is None:
30	        project = MacSandboxProject.cwd()
31	        agent = CliAgent(project)
32	        agent.run_forever()
33	
34	
35	@main.command()
36	@click.argument("log_file", type=click.Path(exists=True))
37	@click.option("--output", "-o", type=click.Path(), default=None)
38	def log(log_file: str, output: str | None) -> None:
39	    log_path = Path(log_file)
40	    output_path = Path(output) if output else None
41	    result_path = logviewer.convert_log_to_html(log_path, output_path)
42	    print(f"Log written to {result_path}")
43	
44	
45	@main.command()
46	def run() -> None:
47	    print("run subcommand invoked")

102	def read_log_file(path: Path) -> list[dict]:
103	    messages: list[dict] = []
104	    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
105	        for line in fh:
106	            stripped = line.strip()
107	            if stripped:
108	                messages.append(json.loads(stripped))
109	    return messages
110	
111	
112	def convert_log_to_html(path: Path, output_path: Path | None = None) -> Path:
113	    messages = read_log_file(path)
114	    if output_path is None:
115	        output_path = path.with_suffix(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_EXT)
116	    html_content = _build_html(messages)
117	    output_path.write_text(html_content, encoding="utf-8")
118	    return output_path

12	    if verbosity == 0:
13	        return

15	    if verbosity > 1:
16	        log_level = logging.DEBUG
17	    stream_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
18	    stream_handler.addFilter(lambda record: record.name.startswith("tim."))
19	    stream_handler.setLevel(log_level)
20	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])
21	
22	
23	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)
24	@click.option("-v", "--verbose", count=True, default=0)
25	def main(verbose: int) -> None:
26	    _configure_logging(verbose)
27	    ctx = click.get_current_context()
28	
29	    if ctx.invoked_subcommand is None:
30	        project = MacSandboxProject.cwd()
31	        agent = CliAgent(project)
32	        agent.run_forever()
33	
34	
35	@main.command()
36	@click.argument("log_file", type=click.Path(exists=True))

39	    log_path = Path(log_file)

41	    result_path = logviewer.convert_log_to_html(log_path, output_path)
